---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the PharmaCare Platform
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.
_Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."_

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include details on:
- How the feature should work from a user's perspective
- Any UI/UX considerations
- API changes (if applicable)

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, wireframes, or screenshots about the feature request here.
